enhanced_reconciliation.description: Use new reconciliation engine with auto-correction — canary rollout: increase rollout_pct in 25% increments, monitor settla_reconciliation_failed_total between steps

deep_health_checks.description: Use deep health checks instead of simple /health

circuit_breakers.description: Enable circuit breakers on all external calls
